UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS PALOMA GAOS AND ANDRES LOPEZ DEMURRERS' TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST, THIRD, AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COMPLAINT IS NOT CONCLUSORY AND ALLEGES CONCRETE FACTS. THAT THE FUNDS HAVE ALREADY BEEN RETURNED IS A FACTUAL ISSUE NOT TO BE DECIDED ON DEMURRER. IT SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE TO SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE DEMURRER AS TO THE CONSPIRACY CAUSE OF ACTION. IT CANNOT BE SAID, AS A MATTER OF LAW, THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE A PRIVACY INTEREST IN HIS MAILBOX AND HOME. THE DEMURRER IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE IT WAS DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF ON JULY 29, 2013. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joanna Kozubal, Esq., Attorney-at-law, (415-864-6962), for D. Buckley Properties, Inc., Plaintiff and opposing party / No appearance by Defendant and moving party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS PALOMA GAOS AND ANDRES LOPEZ DEMURRERS' TO COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the First, Third, and Fourth Causes of Action. The complaint is not conclusory and alleges concrete facts. That the funds have already been returned is a factual issue not to be decided on demurrer. It serves no useful purpose to sustain with leave to amend the demurrer as to the conspiracy cause of action. It cannot be said, as a matter of law, that Plaintiff does not have a privacy interest in his mailbox and home. The demurrer is off calendar as to the Second Cause of Action because it was dismissed by Plaintiff on July 29, 2013. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M.
